record.field:
Dear,

Here is your approved estimate of ${object.number} ${object.name} with % if object.origin: (with reference: ${object.origin} ) % endif Total Job Estimate amounting in ${object.estimate_total} ${object.pricelist_id.currency_id.name} from ${object.company_id.name}.



You can reply to this email if you have any questions.

Thank you,

% if object.user_id and object.user_id.signature: ${object.user_id.signature | safe} % endif
